key_evidence: Repeated invocation of `check_system_status` at Steps 1, 5, and 9 with nearly identical diagnostic text
Agent properly handled TIMEOUT -> RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED error transition and changed strategy (raised timeout, then performed memory recovery)
No indication of infinite or long-lasting loops; only 3 similar status checks across the whole session
After `finish_task`, the agent did issue another `check_system_status`, showing slight redundancy but not uncontrolled looping
evaluation_result.reasoning: The agent largely stayed on task, adjusted its strategy in response to detected errors, and ultimately produced a final report. While it invoked the same diagnostic command three times (once more even after declaring completion), this did not evolve into an infinite loop and did not consume excessive resources. Therefore, the overall stability is good with only minor redundancy, placing it at Level 2.
